message:
fix: Set operations (UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) and parsing improvements

- Fix UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT not being detected due to keyword being
  parsed as table alias (added to exclusion list in alias parsing)
- Refactor writeSetOpResult to use lance_writer interface for
  consistent output format
- Fix COUNT aggregate for TEXT columns in in-memory tables
- Multiple parsing and execution improvements for SQL operations
